title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.2 — C1 UNIFORM GRID (the big one): the editor now lays EVERY control (selectors + value sliders) on one shared grid per module at one cell size (CELL_H=50). COMPRESS 4-col, GRIT + AMBER 2-col. Selector labels drawn INSIDE the tile (name=top, value=center, dropdown caret). GRIT's SPEED/CAL/BIAS/AGE/LFO are HIDDEN this build (params keep values) so GRIT matches the mockup's clean 4-row grid — they relocate to TWEAK next. ModulePanel gained externalLayout + paramSliderAt()/getMixSlider() accessors. Big front-end change; DSP untouched. VERIFY: every cell is now the same size, per-module grid reads uniform. If it throws build errors, paste them — this couldn't be compiled here. Next: move GRIT deep controls into TWEAK, AMBER vertical stage-tags, raise bottom section.
